noAttachmentsCompose: This message has no attachments yet.
optionLoadExternalImages: Load external images (privacy risk: may load tracking pixels)
optionIncludeHeaders: Include internet headers (message ID, conversation ID)
optionPageNumbers: Add page numbers and footer to every page
optionBatchMerge: Combine all selected emails into one continuous PDF (otherwise: one PDF per email)
optionMergeAttachments: Combine selected attachments into one shared PDF
optionRemoveOriginals: Remove original attachments after a successful conversion
noteCapabilities: This creates a single PDF from the subject, header details, message body, and the attachments selected above. PDF attachments are appended page-for-page; images (JPG/PNG/GIF/BMP/WEBP) are embedded as their own page. Unsupported formats (e.g. Office documents, ZIP, TIFF) get a notice page with filename and reason instead of silently going missing.
noteNoServer: Everything happens right here in the task pane, inside Outlook's browser context. There is no server that content gets sent to – the finished PDF is offered as a regular browser download.
noteBatchInfo: Attachments are automatically and fully embedded per email (like "Save as PDF", but without picking individual attachments). External images are always blocked in batch mode. With "one PDF per email", the browser opens several downloads in a row – some browsers ask for permission once before allowing that.
noteConvertSupportedTypes: Only PDF and image attachments (JPG/PNG/GIF/BMP/WEBP) can be converted automatically – those rows are shown disabled below. Unsupported attachments stay attached to the message unchanged.
noteNeverSendPre: If converting a single attachment fails, that original attachment is left untouched. The message is
batchNoticeRest: This view processes all emails selected below, one after another. Whether Outlook triggers the ribbon command for a multi-selection at all depends on the client and version – if this view is empty or the single-email view shows up instead, open each email individually.
errorUnsupportedMailbox18: This Outlook doesn't support the Mailbox API (1.8, needed for attachment access) that Postfach2PDF requires.
errorUnsupportedNoSelection13: No email is open and the multi-select API (Mailbox 1.13) isn't available. Please open an email individually.
statusPdfSuccess: PDF created and offered for download.
statusBatchPartialFailure: {failed} of {total} emails had problems, see result.
resultMergedIntoSharedPdf: embedded in shared PDF ({count} attachment results)
statusAttachingMergedPdf: Attaching shared PDF to the message …
resultDetailTypeNotSupported: file type not supported in this version
conversionPartialFailure_one: {count} attachment could not be converted, see result.
conversionPartialFailure_other: {count} attachments could not be converted, see result.
reasonCloudAttachment: Cloud attachment (share link): content cannot be read automatically in this version.
reasonEmbeddedOutlookItem: Embedded Outlook item (e.g. email/appointment/contact) is not converted automatically in this version.
reasonSizeLimitExceeded: Attachment was skipped: size ({size}) exceeds the {limit} limit for this version.
reasonUnsupportedContentFormat: Attachment content is in a format ({format}) that this version doesn't process.
reasonPdfEmbedFailed: PDF attachment could not be embedded (possibly encrypted or corrupted): {message}
reasonImageEmbedFailed: Image attachment could not be embedded: {message}
reasonUnsupportedFileType: Automatic conversion of this file type ({type}) is not implemented in this version.
